claim: The live agent studio is a free, open-source platform for building AI agents with templates, submission support, and community voting for hackathon competitions
actionable: Use the live agent studio to scaffold your next AI agent project; follow the developer guide templates to quickly turn CLI agents into API-backed production systems
source_title: The GLOW-UP Every AI Agent Needs

claim: Agent Zero allows you to connect a locally-running Python agent to a cloud frontend instantly by providing just 4 pieces of config: Supabase URL, anonymous API key, agent endpoint, and bearer token
actionable: To deploy an agent frontend in minutes: run your FastAPI agent locally, grab your Supabase credentials, enter them into Agent Zero, and share the hosted UI with zero setup friction
source_title: The GLOW-UP Every AI Agent Needs

claim: Building an API endpoint around a Pydantic AI agent requires FastAPI, proper CORS policy setup, Supabase for conversation history, and bearer token authentication to protect the endpoint
actionable: When turning a CLI agent into an API: wrap it with FastAPI, add bearer token auth, use Supabase for message storage (fetch last 10 messages to manage token costs), and enable CORS for external frontends
source_title: The GLOW-UP Every AI Agent Needs

claim: Don't pull entire conversation history into LLM calls; instead, fetch and feed only the last ~10 messages to avoid excessive token costs on long conversations
actionable: In your agent endpoint, query only the most recent N messages from your database; use configurable limits (e.g., LIMIT 10) to cap context window and token spending
source_title: The GLOW-UP Every AI Agent Needs

claim: Use a Unix socket or event-based communication between local agents for asynchronous coordination; cloud agents don't need synchronous responses from the user
actionable: Implement event hooks (e.g., on completion of agent work) to trigger follow-up agents or verifiers; decouple agent execution from user input using event streams
source_title: The GLOW-UP Every AI Agent Needs

claim: Pydantic AI models should be queried with message history formatted as ModelRequest (for user messages) and ModelResponse (for AI responses), requiring custom mapping from database records
actionable: When converting Supabase message history to Pydantic AI, map user messages to ModelRequest objects and AI responses to ModelResponse; handle tool calls separately in a second pass
source_title: The GLOW-UP Every AI Agent Needs

claim: Supabase provides free real-time communication which enables instant UI feedback when messages arrive from agents; enable real-time on your messages table
actionable: When setting up Supabase for agent message storage, run the provided SQL, then enable row-level security and real-time on the messages table for live UI updates
source_title: The GLOW-UP Every AI Agent Needs

claim: Bearer token protection on agent endpoints is essential to prevent unauthorized API calls that consume your LLM credits; set this as an environment variable and verify in each request
actionable: Always add bearer token verification to your agent endpoints before any agent execution; validate the Authorization header matches your secret token before processing the request
source_title: The GLOW-UP Every AI Agent Needs

claim: The live agent studio developer guide provides SQL templates, schema definitions, and sample agent code to eliminate guessing about conversation storage structure
actionable: Always read the developer guide first; copy the provided SQL, follow the input/output schema exactly, and use the sample agent code as a template to stay in sync with the platform
source_title: The GLOW-UP Every AI Agent Needs

claim: You can test your deployed agent instantly using the same API endpoint you built; verify that requests from the frontend arrive at your local agent by watching terminal logs
actionable: After deploying your API, keep a terminal window open showing your agent logs; send test messages through the frontend and watch the logs to confirm end-to-end connectivity
source_title: The GLOW-UP Every AI Agent Needs
